visa_types.name: Close Relatives-family Members Visits
visa_types.documents_required:
General requirements for customers:
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence in the Republic of Kyrgyzstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Request from the host person, original invitation (special form of the Hungarian Migration Service VAN); notarized invitation, a copy of the passport and a certificate of income of the inviting party.
- Confirmation of the nationality of the inviting person and family ties:
- in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member country (extract from the real estate cadastre of a Hungarian citizen, registration card ("address-card"), if inviting person is a close relative.
- Copy of passport of inviting person
- Proof of residence in Hungary of inviting person in Hungary
- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement, bank statements.
- Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary: Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other relevant document indicating that accommodation is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- For minors:
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
Please note:
Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable if the application is made at a visa service centre.
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 27 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 30 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their
                                                                        Application form in the new photo format, as
                                                                        explained below.
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must
                                                                            be an un-mounted, full face photo, as
                                                                            displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within
                                                                            the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must
                                                                        measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the
                                                                            frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair
                                                                            to the bottom of the chin) should measure
                                                                            about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front
                                                                            view in which the visa customer is facing
                                                                            the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80
                                                                            percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have
                                                                            only a white background. Photos with dark,
                                                                            busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be
                                                                            accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both
                                                                            face and hair, should be shown from the
                                                                            crown of the head to the tip of the chin on
                                                                            top and bottom and from hairline
                                                                            side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

visa_types.documents_required:
LIST OF REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
BUSINESS VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating what expenses the company incurs. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document (certificate) of no tax debt.
- Original invitation (+ copy) from the company or business partner on official letterhead of the company with the seal and signature of the responsible person (whose name, position and contact details must also be indicated). If the invitation is not in English or Russian, then its translation into English. The translation must be notarized.
- Original (+ copy) of a notarized letter of guarantee.
- Hotel reservation.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
- GUEST VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document (certificate) of no tax debt.. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes.
- The original of an official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). parties with translation into English or Russian.
- Reservation of accommodation in a hotel, if the invitation does not indicate that the inviting party provides accommodation.
- Booking round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy), valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count.
- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parents/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
- VISA FOR TRAVELING FOR TREATMENT
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document (certificate) of no tax debt.. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes.
- The original of an official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). parties with translation into English or Russian.
- Original (+ copy) confirmation letter from the medical institution indicating the duration of treatment, accommodation, estimated cost of treatment and, if necessary, confirmation that payment for treatment is guaranteed or has already been made. If the confirmation is not written in English or Russian, then its translation into English.
- The conclusion of the attending physician from the Kyrgyz Republic, containing information about the nature and nature of the disease, the rationale and motives for treatment abroad (original + copy)
- Booking a hotel stay if your treatment will not take place in a hospital.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Documents confirming the availability of own financial resources (in proportion to the period of the requested visa and the complexity of the upcoming treatment): for example, a current bank statement showing the movement of funds for the last 3 months. Cash does not count. If necessary, documents on your financial status in the Kyrgyz Republic, for example, documents on existing real estate.
- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parents/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
TOURIST VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document (certificate) of no tax debt.. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes.
- The original of an official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). parties with translation into English or Russian.
- Hotel booking confirmation (directly from the hotel itself, not from intermediaries). If necessary, confirmation of the booked tour. If the hotel and / or tour is paid / prepaid confirmation of payment. If the confirmation is not written in English or Russian, then its translation into English.
- Redeemed round-trip ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy), valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Documents confirming the availability of own financial resources (in proportion to the period of the requested visa and the complexity of the upcoming treatment): for example, a current bank statement showing the movement of funds for the last 3 months. Cash does not count. If necessary, documents on your financial status and marital status in the Kyrgyz Republic, for example, documents on existing real estate (original + copy), marriage and divorce certificates, birth certificates of children (original + copy), etc.
- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parents/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
ATTENTION !
As part of the visa representation agreement, the Embassy of Hungary accepts applications for Schengen visas to Sweden in Bishkek from citizens of the Kyrgyz Republic, or have an appropriate residence permit, the validity of which should not expire earlier than three months from the expiration date of the visa.
                                                                    
The application must be submitted at least 15 days and maximum 6 months before the date of the planned trip. It may take a longer period of time to consider applications from foreign citizens.
                                                                    
Please familiarize yourself with the rules for entering Sweden in advance, as the presence of a visa does not guarantee the possibility of entering the country. Official information is available on the website of the Embassy.
Documents are accepted only in English or Russian. All documents are submitted personally by the applicant or his official representative. Children under 12 are exempt from fingerprinting. Applicants who previously submitted biometric data (fingerprints) when applying for a Schengen visa during the last 59 months can submit documents without personal presence.
                                                                    
The original documents must be submitted along with a copy.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
ATTENTION !
As part of the visa representation agreement, the Embassy of Hungary accepts applications for Schengen visas to Sweden in Bishkek from citizens of the Kyrgyz Republic, or have an appropriate residence permit, the validity of which should not expire earlier than three months from the expiration date of the visa.
                                                                    
The application must be submitted at least 15 days and maximum 6 months before the date of the planned trip. It may take a longer period of time to consider applications from foreign citizens.
                                                                    
Please familiarize yourself with the rules for entering Sweden in advance, as the presence of a visa does not guarantee the possibility of entering the country. Official information is available on the website of the Embassy.
Documents are accepted only in English or Russian. All documents are submitted personally by the applicant or his official representative. Children under 12 are exempt from fingerprinting. Applicants who previously submitted biometric data (fingerprints) when applying for a Schengen visa during the last 59 months can submit documents without personal presence.
                                                                    
The original documents must be submitted along with a copy.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually processed within 15 days of receipt of documents by the Embassy of Hungary in Bishkek, if all necessary documents are in order (not including the day of submission at the Visa Center). The Embassy of Hungary in Bishkek may request additional documents to make a decision if necessary. Please note that the provision of all the above documents does not guarantee the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the web site. This information will allow you to prepare your documents properly. This will reduce the chances that your application will be considered longer or rejected due to improper preparation of documents.

At the Visa Application Centre, it is possible to apply for a long-term visa (residence permit) for the following purposes:
- education (students on a fee-paying basis),
- a residence permit for a self-employed migrant,
- Residence permit for employment.
Contacts and address of the VFS office: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kgz/ru/hun (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kgz/ru/hun) (Bishkek, 62 Kievskaya Street, Business Center "Eurasia" (Eurasia), 4th floor, e-mail: info.hungarykyr@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.hungarykyr@vfshelpline.com)). Applications at the Center are accepted daily, from Monday to Friday, from 9:00 to 17:00, (Reception hours 9:00-14:00), except holidays and free days.
Basic information:
- Applications for "D" visas must be submitted personally by the applicant. Documents are not accepted through a proxy. All applicants over 6 years of age must be fingerprinted.
- The consular fee is 110 (one hundred ten) euros for all applicants (payment must be made through the cash desk of the visa center and is accepted only in KGS).
- The VFS Global Service Fee for D Visa is 30 euros inclusive of VAT.
- The service fee 30 (thirty) euros inc. VAT for all applicants (payment must be made through the cash desk of the visa center and is accepted only in KGS).
- An application for temporary residence is considered by the General Directorate of Migration of Hungary up to 90 days (study visas up to 15 days), if necessary, this period can be extended to 60 calendar days.
- In case of a positive decision of the application, the Embassy of Hungary issues a visa "D" for a single entry with a stay of 30 days in Hungary. During this period, the applicant must obtain a residence permit card from the regional office of the General Directorate of Migration in Hungary.
- Depending on the purpose of your stay, please print out the relevant application form (in English or Hungarian) from the website of the General Directorate of Migration of Hungary.
Main documents:
- The application form for a Hungarian visa "D" (application form) is filled out in block letters without blanks in English and signed personally by the applicant (in two places);
- 2 color passport photographs taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background;
- A passport that must have at least 2 blank pages, the date of its issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested period of stay;
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas);
- A document confirming the purpose of the trip (guest - a certified letter of invitation, educational - an invitation/certificate from an educational institution, family reunification: marriage certificates, birth certificates, etc.);
- Documents confirming the place of residence in Hungary;
- Documents confirming the availability of means of subsistence for the requested period of residence (for example: an up-to-date bank statement showing the availability of funds and a bank statement (from the one whose funds are confirmed by the balance); certificates of income (e.g. scholarships); guarantee obligations);
- proof of comprehensive health insurance, (medical insurance policy valid for the entire period of stay for a minimum of 30,000 EURO) (some companies may not be accepted);
- Documents confirming departure from the country at the end of the residence permit (purchased air ticket, availability of funds),
- For minors: the consent of a parent or legal guardian if the minor is traveling alone or accompanied by one of the parents (consent from a parent who is not traveling to Hungary), with notarization and with an English or Hungarian translation.
* Family reunification: Marriage and birth certificates confirming family ties must be apostilled and the documents must be translated into Hungarian. The translation must be certified by the accredited Hungarian translation office Offi, or by the Hungarian consular services (a separate fee is charged).
Further information on the documents can be found on the website of the Hungarian Directorate-General for Migration in Hungarian and English at the following link: www.oif.gov.hu (http://www.oif.gov.hu/)
Please note that all documents must be submitted in Hungarian or English, or with a translation into Hungarian or English. When submitting an application, if possible, all available documents must be submitted to the Consulate in original. It is necessary to make copies of all documents submitted in the original.
Please note that if you wish to issue a power of attorney to your employer in Hungary authorizing them to act on your behalf and in your interests with the OIF (General Directorate of Migration of Hungary) in relation to your residence permit, you must personally sign the power of attorney in the presence of the Consul at the Embassy. In order for the OIF (General Directorate of Migration of Hungary) to accept a power of attorney, the Consulate must certify the document. The certification fee is 30 EUR and is paid to Demir Bank by a payment order issued by an employee of the Consulate. For faster and more efficient certification, applicants with a power of attorney are kindly requested to come to the Embassy at 2:30 p.m. on the same day after submitting the application to VFS to sign the power of attorney.

- The Consular Section would like to draw the attention of applicants who intend to travel to Hungary to continue their studies and have a state scholarship that they have created a separate post office called StudyVisa.BIS@mfa.gov.hu (mailto:StudyVisa.BIS@mfa.gov.hu) to facilitate appointments.

Students intending to travel to Hungary for the purpose of studying must send a copy of their passport and university acceptance certificate to the above email address. On the basis of these documents, our consulate registers the applicant for the submission of documents. After confirmation, applicants must appear at the consulate at the specified time. If the applicant does not show up at the specified time (e.g. could not arrive on time, documents are not ready, did not record the time correctly, etc.), the Consular Section will only be able to provide him with a much later date for submission.

- a completed and signed application form,
- 2 photos,
- Certificate of acceptance or proof of student status,
- Scholarship certificate,
- certificate from the dormitory, or hotel reservation, or lease agreement
- Booking of plane tickets
- Travel insurance.
It should be noted that the proceedings for the payment of the scholarship may be delayed, so it is proposed to have funds with you for the duration of this process.
- Fee-paying students must submit their applications to VFS. Pre-registration can be made on the https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kgz/en/hun (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kgz/en/hun) website

Documents required for submission if the applicant pays for tuition on their own:
- a completed and signed application form,
- 2 photos,
- Certificate of acceptance or proof of student status,
- Proof of payment of the relevant tuition fee,
- Proof of dormitory, hotel reservation or apartment rental agreement,
- proof of financial support: proof of a bank account in your name, bank confirmation of parents with a letter of guarantee and proof of family ties,
- booking air tickets,
- Travel insurance.
The procedure begins only when all the necessary documents are available at the consular office. Full applications are sent to the relevant regional office of the Hungarian Directorate General for Migration Issues, where a decision is made within 10-15 days. The consulate cannot provide information on the state of affairs. After the decision of the General Directorate of Migration of Hungary, the Consular Section will notify the applicant of the receipt of the visa. The Consular Section does not have the ability to speed up the procedure, so we strongly recommend that you start the procedure on time. We also recommend that you purchase a ticket for travel only after obtaining a visa, only a reservation is enough to apply. In case of questions, the Consular Section is available at the above email address and telephone number during the reception hours of applicants.
If the applicant wishes to travel to Hungary for the purpose of family reunification or for a purpose other than work or study, as well as to stay for a period exceeding 90 days, then he can receive preliminary advice on the application on the Visa.Bis@mfa.gov.hu (mailto:Visa.Bis@mfa.gov.hu) website.

visa_types.name: Business/work
visa_types.documents_required:
General documents:
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence in the Republic of Kyrgyzstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Business trip:
- The original invitation (a copy) from a firm or business partner on the company's official form with the seal and signature of the person in charge (whose name, position and contact details must also be specified). If the invitation is not written in English, Hungarian or Russian, it is translated into English.
- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement, bank statements.
- Order of business trip from Kyrgyzstan company or organization which is sending to business trip with following information: surname, name of customer and his position, purpose and terms of trip.
- Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary:
Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other relevant document indicating that accommodation is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- For minors:
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable if the application is made at a visa service centre.
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 27 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 30 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.

## Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if
                                                                        you enter Hungary with one of the following
                                                                        purposes.
- Members of official delegations
- Employees sent to business trips
- Individual entrepreneurs who need visas for
                                                                            business trips
- Drivers (international shipments,
                                                                            international passenger carrying operations)
- Members of train, refrigerating and
                                                                            locomotive crews

## Documents Required
General documents:
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence in the Republic of Kyrgyzstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Business trip:
- The original invitation (a copy) from a firm or business partner on the company's official form with the seal and signature of the person in charge (whose name, position and contact details must also be specified). If the invitation is not written in English, Hungarian or Russian, it is translated into English.
- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement, bank statements.
- Order of business trip from Kyrgyzstan company or organization which is sending to business trip with following information: surname, name of customer and his position, purpose and terms of trip.
- Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary:
Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other relevant document indicating that accommodation is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- For minors:
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable if the application is made at a visa service centre.
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 27 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 30 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their
                                                                        Application form in the new photo format, as
                                                                        explained below.
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must
                                                                            be an un-mounted, full face photo, as
                                                                            displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within
                                                                            the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must
                                                                        measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the
                                                                            frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair
                                                                            to the bottom of the chin) should measure
                                                                            about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front
                                                                            view in which the visa customer is facing
                                                                            the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80
                                                                            percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have
                                                                            only a white background. Photos with dark,
                                                                            busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be
                                                                            accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both
                                                                            face and hair, should be shown from the
                                                                            crown of the head to the tip of the chin on
                                                                            top and bottom and from hairline
                                                                            side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually
                                                                        processed within 15 days of receipt of documents
                                                                        by the Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek,
                                                                        if all necessary documents are in order
                                                                        (not including the day of submission at the Visa
                                                                        Center). However, in some cases, consideration
                                                                        of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek may
                                                                        request additional documents to make a decision
                                                                        if necessary. Please note that the provision of
                                                                        all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the
                                                                        web site. This information will allow you to
                                                                        prepare your documents properly. This will
                                                                        reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper
                                                                        preparation of documents.

visa_types.documents_required:
LIST OF REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
BUSINESS VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating what expenses the company incurs. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes.
- Original invitation (+ copy) from the company or business partner on official letterhead of the company with the seal and signature of the responsible person (whose name, position and contact details must also be indicated). If the invitation is not in English or Russian, then its translation into English. The translation must be notarized.
- Original (+ copy) of a notarized letter of guarantee.
- Hotel reservation.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
GUEST VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes.
- The original of an official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). parties with translation into English or Russian.
- Reservation of accommodation in a hotel, if the invitation does not indicate that the inviting party provides accommodation.
- Booking round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy), valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count.
- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parents/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
VISA FOR TRAVELING FOR TREATMENT
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).

Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes.
- The original of an official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). parties with translation into English or Russian.
- Original (+ copy) confirmation letter from the medical institution indicating the duration of treatment, accommodation, estimated cost of treatment and, if necessary, confirmation that payment for treatment is guaranteed or has already been made. If the confirmation is not written in English or Russian, then its translation into English.
- The conclusion of the attending physician from the Kyrgyz Republic, containing information about the nature and nature of the disease, the rationale and motives for treatment abroad (original + copy)
- Booking a hotel stay if your treatment will not take place in a hospital.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Documents confirming the availability of own financial resources (in proportion to the period of the requested visa and the complexity of the upcoming treatment): for example, a current bank statement showing the movement of funds for the last 3 months. Cash does not count. If necessary, documents on your financial status in the Kyrgyz Republic, for example, documents on existing real estate.
- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parents/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
TOURIST VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.

## Overview
ATTENTION !
As part of the visa representation agreement, the
                                                                        Embassy of Hungary accepts applications for
                                                                        Schengen visas to Spain in Bishkek from citizens
                                                                        of the Kyrgyz Republic, or have an appropriate
                                                                        residence permit, the validity of which should
                                                                        not expire earlier than three months from the
                                                                        expiration date of the visa. 
The application must be submitted at least 15
                                                                        days and maximum 6 months before the date of the
                                                                        planned trip. It may take a longer period of
                                                                        time to consider applications from foreign
                                                                        citizens. 
Please familiarize yourself with the rules for
                                                                        entering Spain in advance, as the presence of a
                                                                        visa does not guarantee the possibility of
                                                                        entering the country. Official information is
                                                                        available on the website of the Embassy. 
Documents are accepted only in English or
                                                                        Russian. All documents are submitted personally
                                                                        by the applicant or his official representative.
                                                                        Children under 12 are exempt from
                                                                        fingerprinting. Applicants who previously
                                                                        submitted biometric data (fingerprints) at the
                                                                        Hungarian Embassy in Bishkek when applying for a
                                                                        Schengen visa during the last 59 months can
                                                                        submit documents without personal presence.
The original documents must be submitted along
                                                                        with a copy. 
The Embassy does not have the opportunity to make
                                                                        photocopies of documents!

## Documents Required
LIST OF REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
BUSINESS VISA
- Application form completed without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, the date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating what expenses the company incurs. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes.
- Original invitation (+ copy) from the company or business partner on official letterhead of the company with the seal and signature of the responsible person (whose name, position and contact details must also be indicated). If the invitation is not in English or Russian, then its translation into English. The translation must be notarized.
- Original (+ copy) of a notarized letter of guarantee.
- Hotel reservation.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
GUEST VISA

If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes.
- The original of an official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). parties with translation into English or Russian.
- Reservation of accommodation in a hotel, if the invitation does not indicate that the inviting party provides accommodation.
- Booking round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.

- Original (+ copy) confirmation letter from the medical institution indicating the duration of treatment, accommodation, estimated cost of treatment and, if necessary, confirmation that payment for treatment is guaranteed or has already been made. If the confirmation is not written in English or Russian, then its translation into English.

TOURIST VISA

- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.

- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parents/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their
                                                                        Application form in the new photo format, as
                                                                        explained below.
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must
                                                                            be an un-mounted, full face photo, as
                                                                            displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within
                                                                            the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must
                                                                        measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the
                                                                            frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair
                                                                            to the bottom of the chin) should measure
                                                                            about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front
                                                                            view in which the visa customer is facing
                                                                            the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80
                                                                            percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have
                                                                            only a white background. Photos with dark,
                                                                            busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be
                                                                            accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both
                                                                            face and hair, should be shown from the
                                                                            crown of the head to the tip of the chin on
                                                                            top and bottom and from hairline
                                                                            side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually
                                                                        processed within 15 days of receipt of documents
                                                                        by the Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek,
                                                                        if all necessary documents are in order
                                                                        (not including the day of submission at the Visa
                                                                        Center). However, in some cases, consideration
                                                                        of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek may
                                                                        request additional documents to make a decision
                                                                        if necessary. Please note that the provision of
                                                                        all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.

                                                                        web site. This information will allow you to
                                                                        prepare your documents properly. This will
                                                                        reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper
                                                                        preparation of documents.

                                                                            within the last 10 years, with expiry date

                                                                            visa by a minimum of three months, and
                                                                            containing at least
                                                                            two empty pages. The copy of first page of

                                                                            of a third country, the proof of legal
                                                                            residence
                                                                            in the Republic of Kyrgyzstan is presented
                                                                            in accordance with the law (original and
                                                                            copy).
- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate
                                                                                    of school attendance or proof of
                                                                                    studying etc; for retired persons
                                                                                    – proof of pension or other
                                                                                    documents confirming employment. In
                                                                                    letter from work should be showed
                                                                                    the employee's position and salary
                                                                                    for the last three months. For
                                                                                    individual entrepreneurs -
                                                                                    Registration certificate and last
                                                                                    tax statement,
                                                                                    bank statements.
- Documents proving sufficient funds to
                                                                            support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability
                                                                                    of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros
                                                                                    per day for one person. Bank
                                                                                    statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship
                                                                                    letter confirms the coverage of
                                                                                    funds by sponsor (together with
                                                                                    confirmation of the availability of
                                                                                    the sponsor's funds and a copy of
                                                                                    the
                                                                                    sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies
                                                                            of marriage certificate, certificate of
                                                                            birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to
                                                                            return to the country of residence:
                                                                            reservation of return travel ticket for
                                                                            airplane/ train ; driver's license,
                                                                            technical passport, green
                                                                            card, contract with carrier - if travelling
                                                                            by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in
                                                                            Hungary:
Confirmed or prepaid hotel
                                                                            reservation with surname and names of all
                                                                            customers; a document from the accommodation
                                                                            provider or any other
                                                                            relevant document indicating that
                                                                            accommodation is provided in accordance with
                                                                            the legislation of the Schengen member state

                                                                            expenses which might arise in connection
                                                                            with repatriation for medical reasons,
                                                                            urgent medical attention, emergency
                                                                            hospital, treatment
                                                                            or death during the stay; must be valid for
                                                                            all Schengen States and cover the entire
                                                                            period of intended stay or transit; minimum
                                                                            coverage must be 30,000 €;
- For minors:
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized
                                                                                    agreement to leave the parents, in
                                                                                    case one or both parents do not
                                                                                    accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of
                                                                                    parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's
                                                                                    valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the
                                                                                    parents or legal guardians
                                                                                    (sponsorship letter).
Please note:
Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA
                                                                        and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen
                                                                        (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your
                                                                        application will be processed quickly and free
                                                                        of charge, however, the service fee is
                                                                        applicable
                                                                        if the application is made at a visa service
                                                                        centre.
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are
                                                                            under the age of 21 or are dependents, and
                                                                            those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the
                                                                            ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of
                                                                            the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following
                                                                        documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU
                                                                            citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth
                                                                            certificate etc.) and dependency (if
                                                                            required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living
                                                                            in the host country (if they are joining
                                                                            them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel
                                                                            together (if the family member will be
                                                                            accompanying the EU citizen)

                                                                        states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.

For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. If the invitation is not in English or Russian, then its translation into English. The translation must be notarized. Original (+ copy) of a notarized letter of guarantee.

- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. - Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.

Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes. Original official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). In the case of family ties, the provision of birth certificates (copy), as well as marriage certificates (copy) of the inviting party with translation into English or Russian.

VISA FOR TRAVELING FOR TREATMENT
- Application form completed in block letters without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,

For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes. Original official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends issued by the General Directorate of Migration. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). In the case of family ties, the provision of birth certificates (copy), as well as marriage certificates (copy) of the inviting party with translation into English or Russian.
