## Overview
ATTENTION !
As part of the agreement on visa representation,
                                                                        the Embassy of Hungary accepts applications for
                                                                        issuing Schengen visas to Greece in Bishkek from
                                                                        citizens of the Kyrgyz Republic, or have an
                                                                        appropriate residence permit, the validity of
                                                                        which should not expire earlier than three
                                                                        months from the expiration date of the visa.
                                                                    
The application must be submitted at least 15
                                                                        days and a maximum of 6 months before the date
                                                                        of the planned trip. It may take a longer period
                                                                        of time to consider applications from foreign
                                                                        citizens.
Please familiarize yourself with the rules for
                                                                        entering Greece in advance, as the presence of a
                                                                        visa does not guarantee the possibility of
                                                                        entering the country. Official information is
                                                                        available on the following website: www.mfa.gr/missionsabroad/kazakhstan (https://www.mfa.gr/missionsabroad/kazakhstan)
                                                                        and/or www.mfa.gr/en/visas/ (https://www.mfa.gr/en/visas/)
                                                                        and/or https://travel.gov.gr/#/ (https://travel.gov.gr/#/).
                                                                    
 Documents are accepted only in English or
                                                                        Russian.
 All documents are submitted personally by the
                                                                        applicant or his official representative.
                                                                        Children under 12 are exempt from
                                                                        fingerprinting. Applicants who previously
                                                                        submitted biometric data (fingerprints) at the
                                                                        Hungarian Embassy in Bishkek when applying for a
                                                                        Schengen visa during the last 59 months can
                                                                        submit documents without personal presence. 
The original documents must be submitted along
                                                                        with a copy. The Embassy does not have the
                                                                        opportunity to make photocopies of documents!
                                                                        Please DO NOT SEND original invitations and
                                                                        other documents to the Hungarian Embassy. The
                                                                        original invitation shall be submitted together
                                                                        with all necessary documents for obtaining a
                                                                        visa by the applicant. 
The consular fee and service fee is accepted only
                                                                        in EURO! The consular fee must be paid through a
                                                                        bank to the bank account of the Visa Application
                                                                        Centre. Details are provided at the time of
                                                                        submission of documents.

## Visa Fees

                                                                    ]
Visa fees are not charged:
- from children under six years of age;
- Applicants under the Directive 2004/38/EC
- School pupils, students, post graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training - TO BE EVALUATED CASE BY CASE
- Researchers travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research - TO BE EVALUATED CASE BY CASE
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events by non-profit organizations – TO BE EVALUATED CASE BY CASE

## Documents Required
BUSINESS VISA
- An application form filled out in block letters without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, its date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating what expenses the company incurs. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. Original invitation (+ copy) from the firm or business partner on official company letterhead, stamped and signed by the person in charge (whose name, position and contact details must also be included). If the invitation is not in English or Russian, then its translation into English. The translation must be notarized. Original (+ copy) of a notarized letter of guarantee.
- Reservation of hotel accommodation.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
GUEST VISA
- Application form completed in block letters without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, its date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes. Original official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). In the case of family ties, the provision of birth certificates (copy), as well as marriage certificates (copy) of the inviting party with translation into English or Russian.
- Reservation of accommodation in a hotel, if the invitation does not indicate that the inviting party provides accommodation.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Confirmation of financial means, if the trip is made at own expense (bank statement, confirmation from the bank, etc.). Cash does not count.
- For minors: a notarized statement of consent from the parent/guardian (original + copy) and birth certificate (original + copy), as well as a copy of the passport or identity card of the parents / guardian with an English or Russian translation. The Embassy reserves the right to request additional documents in some cases.
VISA FOR TRAVELING FOR TREATMENT
- Application form completed in block letters without gaps in English and signed personally by the applicant,
- 1 current color passport photo taken no more than 6 months ago (3.5 x 4.5 cm) on a white background.
- Passport, which must have at least 2 free pages, its date of issue must not exceed 10 years and the validity of which expires no earlier than 3 months after the expiration of the requested visa.
- A copy of the applicant's passport (pages with personal data and Schengen visas for the last three years and / or a copy from the previous passport).
- Certificate (+ copy) from the place of work (in Russian or English) indicating the position, salary and length of service, as well as the full address of the company with telephone numbers. Leave application. If the company incurs the costs, then a travel certificate or secondment order (in Russian or English) indicating this. For individual entrepreneurs, it is necessary to present an individual entrepreneur card (original + copy) and a supporting document on the balance and deduction of taxes. For pensioners, it is necessary to present a pension certificate (original + copy). For students, the original + a copy of the student card. For all pupils and students, a certificate on the letterhead of the educational institution indicating the type and year of study, as well as the full address of the educational institution with telephone numbers. If you leave during your studies, permission from the educational institution to miss classes. Original official invitation (+ copy) from relatives or friends issued by the General Directorate of Migration. A copy of the passport, visa, permanent residence or registration of the referent (inviting party). In the case of family ties, the provision of birth certificates (copy), as well as marriage certificates (copy) of the inviting party with translation into English or Russian.
- Original (+ copy) confirmation letter from the medical institution indicating the duration of treatment, accommodation, estimated cost of treatment and, if necessary, confirmation that payment for treatment is guaranteed or has already been made. If the confirmation is not written in English or Russian, then its translation into English.
- The conclusion of the attending physician from the Kyrgyz Republic, containing information about the nature and nature of the disease, the rationale and motives for treatment abroad (original + copy).
- Booking a hotel stay if your treatment will not take place in a hospital.
- Reservation of round-trip tickets. The embassy has the right to request a paid ticket.
- Medical insurance policy (original + copy) valid for the entire period of stay with a minimum insurance amount of 30,000 euros, valid in the Schengen area. The medical insurance policy must cover all expenses in case of COVID-19 illness and cannot contain any restrictions on cases due to a pandemic on a territorial basis.
- Documents confirming the availability of own financial resources (in proportion to the period of the requested visa and the complexity of the upcoming treatment): for example, a current bank statement showing the movement of funds for the last 3 months. Cash does not count. If necessary, documents on your financial status in the Kyrgyz Republic, for example, documents on existing real estate.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their
                                                                        Application form in the new photo format, as
                                                                        explained below.
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must
                                                                            be an un-mounted, full face photo, as
                                                                            displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within
                                                                            the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must
                                                                        measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the
                                                                            frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair
                                                                            to the bottom of the chin) should measure
                                                                            about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front
                                                                            view in which the visa customer is facing
                                                                            the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80
                                                                            percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have
                                                                            only a white background. Photos with dark,
                                                                            busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be
                                                                            accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both
                                                                            face and hair, should be shown from the
                                                                            crown of the head to the tip of the chin on
                                                                            top and bottom and from hairline
                                                                            side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually
                                                                        processed within 15 days of receipt of documents
                                                                        by the Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek,
                                                                        if all necessary documents are in order
                                                                        (not including the day of submission at the Visa
                                                                        Center). However, in some cases, consideration
                                                                        of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek may
                                                                        request additional documents to make a decision
                                                                        if necessary. Please note that the provision of
                                                                        all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the
                                                                        web site. This information will allow you to
                                                                        prepare your documents properly. This will
                                                                        reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper
                                                                        preparation of documents.

visa_types.documents_required:
General documents:
- Filled and signed application form
- 1 photo, a color photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations.
- Valid travel document: issued passport within the last 10 years, with expiry date exceeding the expiry date of the requested visa by a minimum of three months, and containing at least two empty pages. The copy of first page of the passport and Schengen visas for the last 3 years If the customer has the citizenship of a third country, the proof of legal residence in the Republic of Kyrgyzstan is presented in accordance with the law (original and copy).
- Proof of proposal of trip:
- An official letter (invitation) from the host organization to participate in this activity.
- A separate sponsorship from the host party, if not included in the request (or other confirmation of the availability of funds).
- A letter of application from a departing Kyrgyzstan organization or institution, about the opening of a visa or from the sports federation and club/school (when going to competitions or training).
- Employment information:
- evidence of employment, certificate of school attendance or proof of studying etc; for retired persons – proof of pension or other documents confirming employment. In letter from work should be showed the employee's position and salary for the last three months. For individual entrepreneurs - Registration certificate and last tax statement, bank statements. If you leave during your studies, permission from the school to skip classes.
- Documents proving sufficient funds to support the stay in Hungary:
- Bank certificate of the availability of cash at the rate of 65-70 euros per day for one person. Bank statements should be for 3 month.
- A northerly established sponsorship letter confirms the coverage of funds by sponsor (together with confirmation of the availability of the sponsor's funds and a copy of the sponsor’s passport).
- Documents confirming marital status (copies of marriage certificate, certificate of birth of children e t.c.).
- Means of transportation and intention to return to the country of residence: reservation of return travel ticket for airplane/ train ; driver's license, technical passport, green card, contract with carrier - if travelling by car
- Proof of the purpose of stay in Hungary:
- Confirmed or prepaid hotel reservation with surname and names of all customers; a document from the accommodation provider or any other relevant document indicating that accommodation is provided in accordance with the legislation of the Schengen member state
- Medical insurance: insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital, treatment or death during the stay; must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit; minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- For minors:
- Copy of certificate of birth
- Copy and original of the notarized agreement to leave the parents, in case one or both parents do not accompany the child
- Copies of passports of both of parents
- Copy of the accompanying person's valid visa in the provided cases
- Financial guarantees of one of the parents or legal guardians (sponsorship letter).
Please note:
Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable if the application is made at a visa service centre.
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 27 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 30 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.

Visa Facilitation for family members of EU/EEA and Swiss Nationals
If you are a family member of an EU/EEA citizen (except Hungary) or Swiss citizen, your application will be processed quickly and free of charge, however, the service fee is applicable if the application is made at a visa service centre.
Family members under this category are:
- Spouse/partner/common law spouse
- The direct descendants (children) who are under the age of 21 or are dependents, and those of the spouse or partner.
- The dependent direct relatives in the ascending line (e.g. parents) and those of the spouse or partner.
Non-EU family member must include the following documents with their visa application:
- application form
- 1 passport sized photograph
- a valid passport and a hard copy of it
- a document proving family ties with the EU citizen (e.g. marriage certificate, birth certificate etc.) and dependency (if required)
- proof that the EU citizen is already living in the host country (if they are joining them)
- a declaration that the couple will travel together (if the family member will be accompanying the EU citizen)
* The European Union (EU) consists of 27 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.
The European Economic Area (EEA) consists of 30 member states:
Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Republic of Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden.

## Photo Specifications
Customers are requested to submit their
                                                                        Application form in the new photo format, as
                                                                        explained below.
General
- The photograph for each visa customer must
                                                                            be an un-mounted, full face photo, as
                                                                            displayed above
- The photograph must have been taken within
                                                                            the last six months.
Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must
                                                                        measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the
                                                                            frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair
                                                                            to the bottom of the chin) should measure
                                                                            about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front
                                                                            view in which the visa customer is facing
                                                                            the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80
                                                                            percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have
                                                                            only a white background. Photos with dark,
                                                                            busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be
                                                                            accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both
                                                                            face and hair, should be shown from the
                                                                            crown of the head to the tip of the chin on
                                                                            top and bottom and from hairline
                                                                            side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually
                                                                        processed within 15 days of receipt of documents
                                                                        by the Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek,
                                                                        if all necessary documents are in order
                                                                        (not including the day of submission at the Visa
                                                                        Center). However, in some cases, consideration
                                                                        of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek may
                                                                        request additional documents to make a decision
                                                                        if necessary. Please note that the provision of
                                                                        all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the
                                                                        web site. This information will allow you to
                                                                        prepare your documents properly. This will
                                                                        reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper
                                                                        preparation of documents.

Photo Size
The photo for each visa customer submitted must
                                                                        measure:
- 35 mm * 45 mm with the head centered in the
                                                                            frame.
- The head (measured from the top of the hair
                                                                            to the bottom of the chin) should measure
                                                                            about 3 cms
Photo Appearance
- The photograph must be a full-face front
                                                                            view in which the visa customer is facing
                                                                            the camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70 – 80
                                                                            percent of the photo area.
- The photograph MUST be in color and have
                                                                            only a white background. Photos with dark,
                                                                            busy, or patterned backgrounds will not be
                                                                            accepted.
- General, the customer's head, including both
                                                                            face and hair, should be shown from the
                                                                            crown of the head to the tip of the chin on
                                                                            top and bottom and from hairline
                                                                            side-to-side. It
                                                                            is preferable that ears be exposed.

## Processing Time
Applications for short-term visas are usually
                                                                        processed within 15 days of receipt of documents
                                                                        by the Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek,
                                                                        if all necessary documents are in order
                                                                        (not including the day of submission at the Visa
                                                                        Center). However, in some cases, consideration
                                                                        of documents may take significantly longer.
The Consulate General of Hungary in Bishkek may
                                                                        request additional documents to make a decision
                                                                        if necessary. Please note that the provision of
                                                                        all the above documents does not guarantee
                                                                        the issuance of a visa.
Carefully read the information provided on the
                                                                        web site. This information will allow you to
                                                                        prepare your documents properly. This will
                                                                        reduce the chances that your application will be
                                                                        considered longer or rejected due to improper
                                                                        preparation of documents.
